errors.text: i had become incredibly bored of the cod forumula and mw left me feeling very unsure about the future of this series
i hope it will spark a list of your own and feel free to steal mine
i feel shy that time
i feel the most loved
i dont know what i feel now or what should i called this feeling now its so weird for me
i am plagued by awkward feelings the charming tale of a not so charming gal named me
i feel oddly nostalgic for some sensations from those times though i do not feel at all nostalgic for the times themselves
i never feel rushed when im with her it doesnt feel like i need to get what im saying out faster or else shell get bored
i will never be a christian so the meaning of christmas to me is purely secular and when i am feeling rebellious a little bit pagan
im left feeling grumpy and irritated far removed from being happy or merry over the nonsense argument as a whole
i have given several colleagues who asked me for free lance advice the same nudge ask for what you feel would make the job worthwhile i tell them
i tend to blog more when i m feeling rotten
i cant help but feel a little stunned not so much because shes around again but because shes around again and i feel like im all over again
i feel irritable and there are so many things that are bothering me even though i know they aren t a big enough deal to justify making me this crazy
i wonder why i feel so violent towards them every so often
i feel more like i am just shy and have some anxiety but nothing like aspergers
i even feel uncomfortable when i get more out of sex than the other person
i liked feeling useful and being needed it eased my own insecurities of being accepted and not rejected
i am now two week out from the surgery and feeling much better
i am very happy being here i am happy with how i look and how i feel i would be content to stay here at and be a size
